targets.query:
import "date"

from(bucket: "finanzas")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kafka_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${red}" == "__all" or r.red == "${red}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${fecha_vencimiento}" == "__all" or (exists r.fecha_vencimiento and r.fecha_vencimiento == "${fecha_vencimiento}"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "monto" or r._field == "origen" or r._field == "numero_tarjeta")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time", "event_id"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${origen}" == "__all" or (exists r.origen and r.origen == "${origen}"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${numero_tarjeta}" == "__all" or (exists r.numero_tarjeta and r.numero_tarjeta == "${numero_tarjeta}"))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      mes: string(v: date.month(t: r._time)),
      dia: string(v: date.monthDay(t: r._time)),
      etiqueta: string(v: date.month(t: r._time)) + "-" + string(v: date.monthDay(t: r._time))
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["etiqueta", "mes", "dia"])
  |> sum(column: "monto")
  |> rename(columns: {monto: "_value"})
  |> group()

import "date"

from(bucket: "finanzas")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kafka_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${red}" == "__all" or r.red == "${red}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "monto" or r._field == "origen" or r._field == "numero_tarjeta")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time", "event_id"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${origen}" == "__all" or (exists r.origen and r.origen == "${origen}"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${numero_tarjeta}" == "__all" or (exists r.numero_tarjeta and r.numero_tarjeta == "${numero_tarjeta}"))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with dia_mes: string(v: date.monthDay(t: r._time)) }))
  |> group(columns: ["dia_mes"])
  |> sum(column: "monto")
  |> rename(columns: {monto: "_value"})
  |> sort(columns: ["dia_mes"])
  |> group()

import "date"

from(bucket: "finanzas")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kafka_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${red}" == "__all" or r.red == "${red}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "monto" or r._field == "origen" or r._field == "numero_tarjeta")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time", "event_id"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${origen}" == "__all" or (exists r.origen and r.origen == "${origen}"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${numero_tarjeta}" == "__all" or (exists r.numero_tarjeta and r.numero_tarjeta == "${numero_tarjeta}"))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with semana_mes: string(v: int(v: (date.monthDay(t: r._time)-1) / 7) + 1) }))
  |> group(columns: ["semana_mes"])
  |> sum(column: "monto")
  |> rename(columns: {monto: "_value"})
  |> sort(columns: ["semana_mes"])
  |> group()

list.label: Origen de carga
list.name: origen
list.query: from(bucket: "finanzas") |> range(start: -24mo) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kafka_consumer") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "origen") |> keep(columns: ["_value"]) |> distinct(column: "_value")

list.label: Tarjeta
list.name: numero_tarjeta
list.query: from(bucket: "finanzas") |> range(start: -24mo) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kafka_consumer") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "numero_tarjeta") |> keep(columns: ["_value"]) |> distinct(column: "_value")
